-- @id: Q23
-- @target: JOIN-002
-- @severity: warning
-- @scenario: 自连接 rental 触发大 Hash
SET work_mem = '64kB';
SELECT r1.rental_id, r2.rental_id
FROM rental r1
INNER JOIN rental r2 ON r1.customer_id = r2.customer_id
WHERE r1.rental_date < r2.rental_date;
RESET work_mem;

  Join Filter: (r1.rental_date < r2.rental_date)

         Buckets: 2048  Batches: 32  Memory Usage: 44kB
        ->  Seq Scan on rental r2  (cost=0.00..318.72 rows=16472 width=16) (actual time=0.002..2.747 rows=16044 loops=1)
Total runtime: 124.033 ms
